titleStmt.title: SII 33.196: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 196. (A.R. No. B 294 of 1951.) Śrīraṅgam, Tiruchinapalli Taluk, Triruchinapalli District, Tamil Nadu.

summary.p: Raṅganāthasvāmi temple, second prākāra, tiers of the Verandah, west side.

Badly damaged. Contains the praśasti of Krishṇadēvarāya describing his victories. Seem to record an endowment of lands in the villages Muttarasanellūr, Peruṅgudi to some maṭha, and also gift of some jewels set with precious stones to the deities. (Published in SII., vol. XXIV, No. 392).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
mēśvara mūrurāyaragaṁḍa Arirāya vibhāḍa Aṣṭadikkurāya manōbhayaṁkara bhāṣege tappavarāyāgaṁḍḍa pūrva dakṣiṇa paścima samudrādhīśvara yavanarājya sthāpanācārya gajapati vibhāḍa śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra kṛṣṇadēvamahārāya
koni pratāparudragajapatirāyala komāruḍu naraharirāyala komāruḍu vīramahāpātruni koḍuku naraharidēvuṁḍu Udagiri mallubhānuṁḍu kasavāpātruṁḍu

vijayanagarānaku viccēśi prīthvīvi sāṁmrājyaṁ cēstuṁnu mariṁni kaḷiṁgadēśa digvijayā¨rthamai bejavāḍaku viccēśi koṁḍavīḍu du¨rggamunu sādhiṁci Ādu¨rggaṁ mīṁda [nunnapra ] rāju śrī hariścaṁdra mahāpātruṁḍu pāḍu
siṁhādri pā riki viccēśi Aka mahādānamuṁnnu śāyanavadariṁci tirugarāju tama ciṁna bu tirumala dēvaṁmaṁ gāricē tanu

mā Ubhayaṁgānu sāsiṁccina rathōtsavānaku varanvānaku varahālu ga 490 varahālaku deccina grāmālu vaḍḍagirimaḷa taṁga mutsaravelūru . peruṁguḍi grāmālu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthayigānu yēṁḍu ga ki ga 100
yyaṁgāri maṭānaku śiṣyaparaṁparagānu vaiṣṇavula Āragistimi . mariṁni dēvuniki mutyālu 4 nu māṇikyālu 3 nu kūḍina padakaṁ 1 mutyāla sarapa ṭiyā ḍu sama¨rpiṁciri . yi talayārikaṁ ka[¨r]ṇikaṁ di 14 ki viṭavaṁ viḷi
Built in writing being mostly below ground
Digital edition of SII 33.196 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
